text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I walk into my office to find Fuji Kiseki
reading some fan letters.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing like receiving a handwritten
letter. It always brings me pure joy to read my
fans' words of support.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I remember the person who sent me this. They
always give me such beautiful bouquets after my
races.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And this one's from... Oh, yes. One of my most
passionate fans yet.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... "I was sitting on the left side at your
last concert, but I felt like you didn't look over as
often as you usually do."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I must've been too caught up in my
performance and forgot to give the audience
enough attention.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I must be more mindful of that bad habit... I don't
want to disappoint my dear supporters.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But of course. I want each of them to feel equally
appreciated and seen.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If my goal was merely to amuse myself, I wouldn't
go to such lengths, but that's not the level of
entertainment I aim to provide.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now then! Time to reply to everyone! Hm, what
should I write back? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki hums happily to herself as she gazes at
all the letters before her.
